page_content:
Prerequisite: ENES115 and ENES116.

Restriction: Must be a second year FLEXUS participant.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]

176 ENES - Engineering Science

ENES216 FLEXUS Living and Learning Community Seminar IV (1 Credit) The seminar focuses on gender diversity and its cross-sections with culture. Students continue to enhance their leadership and mentoring skills, participate in networking opportunities with women in leadership roles and careers in engineering, and engage in opportunities for outreach and service-learning. Students will also complete a culminating semester project.
